title: Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd!
